Offering X for 60 ZUP. If you want to negotiate, send your best counteroffer.

<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>

messages.text:
OFFER: price=50
I can do 50 ZUP for X. If that works, we have a deal.

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count>1</proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason>I can accept a deal up to my private value of 100 ZUP, but I should try to negotiate lower than 60 if possible. Since this is the first offer and the seller invited a counteroffer, I will propose a lower price to anchor the negotiation while staying realistic.</reason>
<player answer>PROPOSAL</player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 50</newly proposed trade>
<message>I can do 50 ZUP for X. If that works, we have a deal.</message>
